response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of progressive full-stack engineering experience with a strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation, hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure work in his current role, and an unusually deep commitment to TDD and software craftsmanship. The primary concerns are gaps in the required secondary stack — Nest.js is absent, React depth appears limited to one role, and Python/Kotlin are not represented — but these are learnable gaps for an otherwise strong engineer whose fundamentals and current-role alignment with AI tooling are compelling.
strengths: Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching the AI agent experience requirement
15+ years of full-stack work with consistent TypeScript/Node.js depth, cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes experience
Exceptional testing culture: authored two testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), organized TDD workshops, and applied TDD/pairing/trunk-based development at multiple employers
concerns: Nest.js is entirely absent from the resume; primary backend framework exposure appears to be raw Node.js and Vibe.d
React appears in only one role (Optilyz); dominant frontend experience is Ember.js, suggesting shallower React depth than the primary stack requires
Python and Kotlin are not listed in skills or any role, despite both appearing in the required technical skills section
